licenseActivate.title: BA Offline License
licenseActivate.uploadHint: Upload the BA Base64 request file (.txt, etc.)
licenseActivate.step2Desc: After verification, a signed JSON is downloaded for import on the device.
licenseActivate.step3Desc: Import the downloaded file on the offline device to finish.
licenseActivate.successMessage: Downloaded. Import it on the offline device.
licenseActivate.fileMissingLK: Request file is missing the license key
licenseActivate.fileMissingFP: Request file is missing the device fingerprint
licenseActivate.fileInvalidBase64: File must be Base64, with valid JSON after decoding
